summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Encouragement System features. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed all 5 encouragement features are working: Progress Indicators, Effort-Based Badges, Encouraging Popups, Small Wins System, and Hints & Second Chances.
passed_tests: Authentication - Login successful for testparent@test.com
Child data includes effort_stats with all required fields (total_attempts, total_correct, total_wrong, current_wrong_streak, etc.)
Effort stats values are valid non-negative numbers
PUT /api/children/{id}/progress with is_correct=true adds stars and increments total_correct
PUT /api/children/{id}/progress with is_correct=false does NOT add stars, increments total_wrong
Wrong streak tracking - increments on wrong answers
Wrong streak resets to 0 on correct answer
GET /api/children/{id}/achievements returns progress_to_next array
progress_to_next items have correct structure (badge, name, current, target, remaining, percentage)
progress_to_next includes effort badges (brave_learner, mistake_master, daily_learner)
All 11 effort badges exist in achievements (brave_learner, never_give_up, mistake_master, daily_learner variants)
Effort badges have category='effort'
never_give_up badge earned by Namal (continued after 3 wrong streak)
Achievements endpoint returns effort_stats
Progress update returns next_badge_progress
questions_today increments on each progress update
UI: Progress Indicator component shows 'Almost There!' with progress bars
UI: Learning Journey stats card shows Questions Tried, Correct Answers, Days Practiced, Mistakes Reviewed
UI: Hint button appears on questions and provides contextual hints
UI: Hint disappears after being used once per question
UI: Questions today counter displays at bottom of practice screen
UI: Encouragement popup appears showing progress to next badge (e.g., 'Only 2 more to earn Ten Stars!')
UI: Achievements modal shows all effort badges (Brave Learner, Never Give Up, Mistake Master, Daily Learner)
UI: Badge celebration modal includes effort badges in BADGE_DATA
seed_data_creation: Namal has: 8 total stars, 14 questions today, 7 correct answers, 1 day practiced, 0 mistakes reviewed, earned first_star, five_stars, and never_give_up badges
context_for_next_testing_agent: Encouragement System fully tested and working. Namal (child ID cd57e76c-02e9-4276-a7c5-f0f7588a9670) has effort_stats tracking active. All 5 encouragement features verified: 1) Progress Indicators show 'Almost There!' with progress bars for upcoming badges, 2) Effort-based badges (brave_learner, never_give_up, mistake_master, daily_learner) are tracked and displayed, 3) Encouraging popups appear showing progress to next badge, 4) Small wins system tracks questions_today, 5) Hint button provides contextual hints per question. API endpoints: PUT /api/children/{id}/progress with is_correct parameter, GET /api/children/{id}/achievements returns progress_to_next array.

progress_indicators.status: Working - shows 'Almost There!' with progress bars for 5 Stars, Brave Learner, Mistake Master badges

effort_based_badges.status: Working - all badges tracked in effort_stats and displayed in achievements modal

encouraging_popups.status: Working - shows 'ALMOST THERE! Only X more to earn Y!' after correct answers
encouraging_popups.trigger: Appears when close to earning a badge (remaining <= 3)

small_wins_system.status: Working - questions_today counter increments and displays at bottom of practice screen

hints_second_chances.status: Working - hint button appears on each question, provides contextual hints, disappears after use

learning_journey_stats.status: Working - shows 4 stats: Questions Tried, Correct Answers, Days Practiced, Mistakes Reviewed
